Home / AI Music / Suno

Suno

AI Music by Suno Inc.
★★★★ ★ 4

The world's most popular AI music generator. Type a prompt and get a complete song with lyrics, melody, and vocals. Free plan: 50 credits daily (10 songs).

Visit Website Paid from: $8/month (Pro)

🆓 Free Tier Details

Free Credits

50 credits daily, 10 songs

Resets daily

Credit Card

✅ Not Required

Watermark

✅ No watermark

Commercial Use

✅ Allowed

Last verified: 2026-05-23

👍👎 Pros & Cons

✅ Pros

  • + Generous free tier (10 songs/day)
  • + Industry-leading music quality
  • + Zero learning curve
  • + Supports Chinese lyrics

❌ Cons

  • - Free plan: no commercial use
  • - Standard audio quality on free plan
  • - Songs limited to ~2 minutes

🎯 Key Features

Generate complete songs from text prompts Multiple genres: pop, rock, electronic, rap and more Free plan includes v4.5 model Pro plan unlocks top-tier v5.5 model Upload your own audio for remixing Split tracks into vocals and instruments

💡 Tips & Tricks

  • 1 English prompts work better
  • 2 More detailed prompts = higher quality
  • 3 Free plan fine for personal use, upgrade for commercial
📅 Last verified: 2026-05-23
